rewritten_requirements: The system shall display the current time when it is waiting for user input.
The system shall allow the user to choose between full power and half power levels.
The system shall enable the user to set cooking time by entering a number.
The system shall remain inactive if the door is open during operation.
The system shall stop immediately when the door is opened during the cooking process.
The system shall allow the user to cancel the cooking process.
The system shall return to displaying the current time after stopping or cancelling and wait for the next use.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Displays the current time while waiting for user input.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The microwave starts by showing the current time while it waits for the user.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allows the user to select between full power and half power levels.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user can choose the power level, either full power or half power, and can switch between them if needed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enables the user to set cooking time by entering a number.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the time is set and the door is closed, the microwave becomes ready to start.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Stays inactive if the door is open during operation.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the door is open, the microwave cannot operate and stays inactive. Once the door is closed again, it becomes ready.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Stops immediately when the door is opened during cooking process.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the door is opened during operation, the microwave stops immediately and becomes inactive.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allows the user to cancel the cooking process.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user can also cancel the process, which brings the microwave back to waiting.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Returns to showing the time after stopping or cancelling and waits for next use.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After stopping or cancelling, the microwave returns to showing the time and waits for the next use.
